highlights.title: Screenshot Preview
highlights.description: Browse your App Store screenshots by version, device and resolution, right inside the app.

highlights.title: Phased Release Progress
highlights.description: Follow an in-progress phased release right on each version row in App Details.

highlights.title: Pre-Submit Checklist
highlights.description: Validate build, screenshots, What's New and more before submitting for review.

highlights.title: Bug Fixes
highlights.description: Several bugs have been fixed to improve stability and performance.
